positive: A geometric, abstract depiction of a mountain range silhouette at sunset. The mountains should be rendered in sharp, stylized facets and varying shades of deep indigo, vibrant cobalt, and burnt orange. Include stylized sun rays emitting from behind the peaks, transforming into sharp, crystalline patterns that interact with the foreground mountains. The overall composition must be centered and vertically balanced, using a limited, high-contrast color palette reminiscent of Japanese woodblock prints (Ukiyo-e style). Ensure the final image is clean, high-contrast, and perfectly isolated for garment printing, with no background texture beyond the stylized elements.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, blurry, grain, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, low quality, muted colors
